mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.offer_id, IFNULL(e.name, u.real_name) AS name, IFNULL(e.phone, u.phone) AS phone, IFNULL(e.email, u.email) AS email, IFNULL(e.department, j.department) AS department, IFNULL(e.position, j.title) AS position, IFNULL(e.expected_join_date, o.expected_join_date) AS expectedJoinDate, e.actual_join_date AS actualJoinDate, e.join_date AS joinDate, e.id_card_status, e.contract_status, e.medical_report_status, e.profile_data, e.status, e.create_time, e.update_time FROM employee e LEFT JOIN offer o ON e.offer_id = o.id LEFT JOIN application a ON o.application_id = a.id AND a.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN job_post j ON a.job_id = j.id AND j.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.candidate_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 ORDER BY e.create_time DESC
